description: Black tracksuit set Track jacket that has a mock collar with a full front zipped closure, long raglan sleeves and one grey stripe from the shoulder to the cuffs, two asymmetric pockets on the front and embroidered branding on the left chestTrack pants that have an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, insert pockets on the sides, two grey stripes on the sides from the waist to the hem and embroidered branding below the left pocket
